vocab.meaning: một sự may mắn bất ngờ
vocab.example: It was a stroke of luck that the sneakers I ordered online fit me perfectly despite the brand's reputation for inconsistent sizing.
Many high-end retailers now offer a virtual fitting room, which mitigates the risk of purchasing ill-fitting footwear.
When shopping on third-party platforms, I am always vigilant to avoid being scammed into buying counterfeit goods.

vocab.meaning: một viễn cảnh đáng e ngại
vocab.example: For some, buying expensive heels without trying them on remains a daunting prospect due to potential discomfort.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra (hình ảnh/video thực tế của khách)
vocab.example: I heavily rely on user-generated content in the review section to see how the shoe's color looks under natural light.

vocab.meaning: các công cụ so sánh giá
vocab.example: I always utilize price comparison tools to ensure I'm getting the most competitive deal across various e-commerce sites.

vocab.meaning: việc mua sắm ngẫu hứng (không dự tính trước)
vocab.example: The targeted ads on social media often entice me into making an impulse purchase of shoes I don't technically need.

vocab.meaning: cổng thanh toán an toàn/bảo mật
vocab.example: I only transact with websites that use a secure payment gateway to protect my sensitive financial information.

vocab.meaning: các gợi ý được cá nhân hóa/thiết kế riêng
vocab.example: The app provides tailor-made recommendations based on my previous browsing history and style preferences.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm đập hộp/mở hộp sản phẩm
vocab.example: Online boutiques often focus on the unboxing experience, including premium packaging that makes the purchase feel more special.
